name: Acrobatics
description: Keep your balance on tricky terrain, tumble, or slip free of a grapple.

name: Animal Handling
description: Calm or control an animal, read its intentions, or handle a mount in a crisis.

name: Arcana
description: Recall lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, and the planes.

name: Athletics
description: Climb, jump, swim, grapple, shove, or muscle past physical obstacles.

name: Deception
description: Convincingly hide the truth in word or deed; mislead, bluff, or disguise intent.

name: History
description: Recall lore about events, ancient kingdoms, wars, and legendary figures.

name: Insight
description: Read a creature's true intentions — detect a lie or predict a next move.

name: Intimidation
description: Influence through overt threats, hostile actions, or sheer menace.

name: Investigation
description: Deduce from clues, search for hidden details, infer how something works.

name: Medicine
description: Stabilize a dying creature or diagnose an illness.

name: Nature
description: Recall lore about terrain, plants, animals, weather, and natural cycles.

name: Perception
description: Spot, hear, or otherwise notice the presence of something.

name: Performance
description: Delight an audience with music, dance, acting, or storytelling.

name: Persuasion
description: Influence with tact, social grace, and good faith.

name: Religion
description: Recall lore about deities, rites, prayers, and holy symbols.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Pick pockets, plant an item, conceal an object, or perform legerdemain.

name: Stealth
description: Hide, move silently, and slip past notice.

name: Survival
description: Track, hunt, navigate the wilds, forecast weather, and avoid natural hazards.
